title: Centipede Control Bay Ridge Brooklyn | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional centipede control in Bay Ridge, Brooklyn. Fast, effective centipede extermination for homes & businesses. Serving Bay Ridge since 2010. Call now for $350-$550 service!
intro: Bay Ridge residents dealing with centipede infestations need fast, reliable solutions tailored to Brooklyn's unique housing landscape. Our professional centipede control services protect Bay Ridge homes and businesses from these unsettling multi-legged pests. With deep knowledge of Bay Ridge's mix of historic brownstones, apartment buildings, and waterfront properties, we deliver targeted treatments that work.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Bay Ridge for over a decade, understanding the specific pest challenges facing this waterfront Brooklyn neighborhood. Our licensed technicians use safe, family-friendly methods and offer same-day service to quickly eliminate centipede problems in your Bay Ridge property.
localContext: Bay Ridge's proximity to the Narrows and its older housing stock—from classic brick homes along Shore Road to pre-war apartments near 86th Street—create ideal conditions for centipede activity, especially in damp basements and ground-level units. The neighborhood's tree-lined streets and established gardens can also contribute to centipede migration into homes during seasonal changes.

faqs.question: Why are centipedes common in Bay Ridge homes?
faqs.answer: Bay Ridge's older buildings, proximity to the waterfront, and humid basements create perfect habitats for centipedes. They're attracted to moisture and often enter through foundation cracks common in the neighborhood's pre-war construction. Our treatments address both the centipedes and the conditions that attract them.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a centipede problem in Bay Ridge?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Bay Ridge, from Shore Road to the Gowanus Expressway. Most appointments can be scheduled within 24 hours, and our treatments begin working immediately to eliminate centipedes from your property.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 centipede control service?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection of your Bay Ridge property, targeted treatment of infested areas, perimeter protection, moisture control recommendations, and a 30-day warranty. The price varies based on property size and infestation severity, with most Bay Ridge homes falling in the mid-range.

faqs.question: Are your centipede treatments safe for families and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We understand Bay Ridge families' concerns and can schedule treatments at convenient times, with most spaces safe to re-enter within 2-4 hours of application.
